name: Carotid Atherosclerosis - Carotid Revascularization (Eleventh Procedure)
description: **Eleventh Procedure-resource phenotype**, **first non-coronary vascular-surgical** procedure (complementing CHD CABG/PCI = coronary-vascular-surgical from batch 4). Tests ability to find CAAD patients via carotid angioplasty/revascularization procedures.
prompt: Find patients who have undergone carotid artery revascularization procedures.

prompts.naive: Find patients who had carotid surgery.
prompts.broad: Find patients who have undergone carotid artery revascularization — angioplasty or stenting performed to treat carotid artery stenosis and reduce stroke risk.
prompts.expert: Search Procedure resources with SNOMED 233259003 (Angioplasty of external carotid artery). Query: Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|233259003

metadata.algorithm_path_description: CAAD patients who underwent carotid revascularization. **Eleventh Procedure phenotype, first non-coronary vascular-surgical.**
